title: Custom logic configuration or generating logic with equal delays?
body:
Is it possible to specify that certain logic should have equal delays?

It's been awhile since I've written any HDL but wouldn't the delay constraints in the generated BLIF files can define this? I guess that doesn't guarantee it can be synthesized but it should be possible to write code for this right?

Basically I'm wanting to try out writing some simple wave pipelined things and am not sure if yosys supports this.  Or would a wave pipeline be something that would need to be implemented as a black box to the HDL code and hand tuned by wiring up the LUTs manually (presuming your delay models are accurate enough for it to work to begin with)?

For instance since there are no fast hard IP blocks for ALUs etc... it might pay off to have manually routed known fast implementation.
